title: Shin`ar #8152
definition:
Shinar = "country of two rivers"

 1) the ancient name for the territory later known as Babylonia or Chaldea
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shinar = "country of two rivers"

 1) the ancient name for the territory later known as Babylonia or Chaldea

    NASB:  another name for Bab.
